name: Warm Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the potatoes and boil until tender.
2. Peel and mince garlic, then place in a small jar.
3. Wash and dry parsley; cut off stems and mince the parsley. Add to the jar with the garlic.
4. Add oil, vinegar, Tabasco (if using), nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Screw the lid on tightly and shake vigorously until the salt is dissolved.
5. Drain potatoes and let them cool slightly. Slice thinly onto a serving platter or into a bowl.
6. Drizzle with dressing and serve hot, warm, or cold.
Serves 6. This recipe makes great leftovers and can be paired with roasted chicken and asparagus for an additional meal.
